author: mkenney2
name: Hymba-8L-SSM4-SWA1024
blurb: 8L Hymba hybrid (Mamba SSM + SWA-1024) with 32K context training. SSM state=4, untied embeddings, WD=0.15, int8+zstd-22, score-first TTT (25 epochs, no freeze). 3-seed exact mean: 1.14670320 BPB / 1.93585543 nats.
technique_summary: Hymba hybrid (Mamba SSM + SWA-1024), 8L 512d, SSM state=4, score-first TTT25, WD=0.15, int8+zstd-22, EMA, Muon optimizer
